source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/DHF DMR/12. 수입검사 기준서_△/CsI/A1717MCW/ABZ, BOE (HME BOE)1717_N(F-BF-0101, F-BF-0102A) 수입검사 성적서.xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: BOE 및 ABZ 1717 Panel에 대한 TFT Panel 수입 검사 성적서 양식이다.
sourceSummary.officialUse: 입고 TFT Panel의 기계적, 외관, 영상 검사 항목과 판정 기준을 기록하는 품질팀 수입검사 성적서로 사용된다.
keyPoints: 부품명은 BOE (HME BOE) 1717 Panel (F-BF-0101) 및 ABZ (HME BOE) 1717 Panel (F-BF-0102A)로 기재되어 있다.
검사 항목은 Mechanical, Visual, IMAGE 항목으로 구성된다.
Revision History에는 Rev No. 0, 최초제정, 2019.07.01이 기재되어 있다.

The issuing or responsible department shown is ㈜에이치앤아비즈 품질팀.
evidence.evidenceText: TFT Panel 수입 검사 성적서 ... ㈜에이치앤아비즈 품질팀

evidence.claim: Applicable models are AR-BF-1300 and AR-BF-1110.
The listed parts are BOE (HME BOE) 1717 Panel (F-BF-0101) and ABZ (HME BOE) 1717 Panel (F-BF-0102A).
evidence.evidenceText: 부 품 명 ... BOE (HME BOE) 1717 Panel (F-BF-0101) ABZ (HME BOE) 1717 Panel (F-BF-0102A
evidence.pageTarget: BOE and ABZ HME BOE 1717 Panel

evidence.claim: Mechanical inspection includes total panel weight and dimensions for horizontal, vertical, and thickness.
evidence.evidenceText: Mechanical ... Total Panel weight ... Dimension ... Horizontal ... Vertical ... Thickness

evidence.claim: Total panel weight specification is minimum 355.5 g, typical 365.5 g, and maximum 375.5 g.
Panel dimension specifications are horizontal 457.8 to 458.2 mm, vertical 476.8 to 477.2 mm, and thickness 0.6 to 0.8 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Dimension Horizontal mm 457.8 458 458.2 ... Vertical mm 476.8 477 477.2 ... Thickness mm 0.6 0.7 0.8

evidence.claim: Visual inspection requires no crack, no dent, no discoloration on interface pad, stain and scratch not confirmed during image inspection, and chipping ≤ 0.5 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Visual Crack - 없을 것 ... Dent - 없을 것 ... Interface Pad - 변색 없을것 ... Stain - 영상 검사시 확인 안될것 ... Scratch - 영상 검사시 확인 안될것 ... Chipping mm ≤ 0.5

evidence.claim: IMAGE inspection includes line defect, 구동 불량, Density (32X32), Stain (3x3), Total Line, and D.Class #0 through #8 criteria.
evidence.evidenceText: IMAGE Line defect ... 구동 불량 ... Density (32X32) ... Stain (3x3) ... Total Line ... D.Class #0 ... D.Class #8

evidence.claim: Revision history records Rev No. 0 as 최초제정 with date 2019.07.01.

reviewFlags.reason: No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified; authority appears to be an internal company quality team.
Document has both AIF801-1-3 (REV.1) and Revision History Rev No. 0, which may refer to different revision scopes.
The 성적서 No., 입고일, LOT No., Panel ID, 수입 검사일, 검사원, and approval fields are blank in the provided text.
Part name text for ABZ (HME BOE) 1717 Panel (F-BF-0102A) appears to have a missing closing parenthesis in the extracted source text.
